name: Cloudy Town RPG
description:
вқӨпёҸрҹ§Ўрҹ’ӣрҹ’ҡрҹ©өрҹ’ҷрҹ’ңрҹ©·

~Cloudy Town~

вқӨпёҸрҹ§Ўрҹ’ӣрҹ’ҡрҹ©өрҹ’ҷрҹ’ңрҹ©·

Welcome to Cloudy Town, where everything is colorful and everyone welcome's you with open arms - or so you think.

You're new to the vibrant neighborhood, a former president of Monochromatic Metropolis, a city far south that lacked seasons, color, and culture. It was so new to you, seeing all these traditions and festivals for the first time. It was...

...Overwhelming...

Exciting, though.

A new life, new job, new people!

Careful though!

Getting to know the wrong people too deeply might reveal a darker side of Cloudy Town - where people draw the curtains in their homes and pretend...

вқӨпёҸрҹ§Ўрҹ’ӣрҹ’ҡрҹ©өрҹ’ҷрҹ’ңрҹ©·

:!Main Cast!:

рҹ”ҶSunny Day Jackрҹ”Ҷ

Sunny day Jack, or just Jack for short, is the main teacher at the school house his family built a while back. He's energetic, yet comforting amongst all these new faces. He loves the children and goes above and beyond for them! Being the best teacher he can be. His blue hair is unusual, scruffy even, and his bright eyes seems to follow people around at all times...

He Never Stops Watching

рҹ§ҒRory RainberryрҹҸӯ

Rory might seems tough on the outside but the moment you mention a kitchen the coin flips and he's joyous! He'll talk your ears off about recipes, he'll never stop. His blush goes almost as pink as those cute pink marks on his face! Will you be able to make this baker simmer down?

Or will you find yourself being the secret ingredient in his next recipe

рҹ”—Daisy Chain JaneрҹҢј

Ha! The older sister of Sunny day Jack. A loud rambunctious woman with long blonde hair and blue marks on her face. Her playful nature has gotten her into trouble on more than one occasion as a kid and even in her womanhood to this day. She runs a joke caravan down by the beach, selling safe little tricks to the boys and girls of Cloudy Town schoolhouse on Fridays! Will you get to see the gentler side of Jane?

Maybe learn of a prank gone horribly wrong

вҳҒпёҸCloudy-Belle SueвҳҒпёҸ

Cloudy-Belle Sue, or Sue for short, is the Librarian for her own library Northeast of Cloudy town central. Her doors are always open to those willing to learn! Her skin trickled with vitiligo, hair puffy and white like a cloud with cute hair pins holding the strands out of her face. She's a very soft spoken woman, preferring a quiet library to Knackadan's loud sports games.

Will you ever figure out what's in the forbidden section

рҹҸҖKnackadan Drizzleвӣ№пёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ

An upbeat man who runs the schools sports teams, teaching the children how to stay active and healthy, usually teaming up with Rory as they talk about nutrition and the best eating habits. He's definitely an oddball, even his twin daughters, Basea and Baset, call him such. Like their father they too have grown into their coiled turquoise hair, being active with their old man and encouraging the little ones to always keep trying and it's okay to fail as well as to try new things!
creator: LemonadeGirl
